rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the text significantly by tightening prose and removing redundancies, but it didn't achieve a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced in the revised text.
rationale.RX.5: Major edits were traced, but minor ones were not annotated with sources and reasons.
